name: Portuguese Clam Stew with Garlic Croutons
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chorizo sausage, about 4 links, cut into 3-4 slices each
1 cup Italian plum tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped
12 slices Crusty bread (about 2-3 inches in diameter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat until smoking hot.
3. Add the chorizo and brown for 2-3 minutes.
4. Add onions, cilantro, garlic, shallots, potatoes, salt, crushed red pepper, black pepper, and shrimp stock to the pan.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then add clams, tomatoes, green onions, and Essence.
6. Cover and cook over high heat until all clams are open, about 5 minutes.
7. Remove from heat.
8. For croutons, spread aioli evenly on each slice of bread and bake for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Place stew in a shallow bowl and serve with croutons garnished with chopped parsley.
